name: scope-exclusion-stale-hold
description: Users excluded from adaptive scope 3 weeks ago but hold GUIDs persist on InPlaceHolds

commands.command: Get-RetentionCompliancePolicy "Global Retention 5Y" | Format-List Name, Guid, Enabled, AdaptiveScopeLocation, DistributionStatus
commands.output:
Name                  : Global Retention 5Y
Guid                  : a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890
Enabled               : True
AdaptiveScopeLocation : {All Employees Scope}
DistributionStatus    : Success
Mode                  : Enforce
WhenCreated           : 06/01/2025 10:00:00 AM

commands.command: Get-AdaptiveScope "All Employees Scope" | Format-List Name, FilterConditions, LocationCount
commands.output:
Name              : All Employees Scope
FilterConditions  : (Department -ne "Contractors")
LocationCount     : 4850
LocationType      : User
WhenCreated       : 05/15/2025 10:00:00 AM
WhenChanged       : 03/12/2026 06:00:00 AM
Status            : Active

commands.command: Get-Mailbox -Identity contractor1@contoso.com | Format-List InPlaceHolds, DelayHoldApplied, DelayReleaseHoldApplied
commands.output:
DisplayName                  : Contractor One
PrimarySmtpAddress           : contractor1@contoso.com
RecipientTypeDetails         : UserMailbox
ArchiveStatus                : None
ArchiveState                 : None
AutoExpandingArchiveEnabled  : False
RetentionPolicy              :
InPlaceHolds                 : {UniHa1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890}
LitigationHoldEnabled        : False
ComplianceTagHoldApplied     : False
DelayHoldApplied             : False
DelayReleaseHoldApplied      : False
ElcProcessingDisabled        : False
SingleItemRecoveryEnabled    : True

commands.command: Get-Mailbox -Identity contractor2@contoso.com | Format-List InPlaceHolds, DelayHoldApplied, AccountDisabled
commands.output:

DelayHoldApplied             : False
DelayReleaseHoldApplied      : False
AccountDisabled              : True
ElcProcessingDisabled        : False
SingleItemRecoveryEnabled    : True

DisplayName          : Contractor One
Department           : Contractors
UserPrincipalName    : contractor1@contoso.com
Title                : External Contractor
Company              : Contoso Staffing

DisplayName          : Contractor Two
Department           : Contractors
